revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:1 nguŏk 13 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:1月13日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 1월 13일]][[zh-min-nan:1 goe̍h 13 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:正月十三]][[zh:正月十三]]
{{Not to be confused with|January 13|qq=January 13}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?-->
{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=一月十三|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 1월 13일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar January|qq=}} '''January 13''' is the 13th day of month {{ill|Zhengyue|en|Zhengyue|qid=Q1072983|lt=January (Mutsuki)|1=Zhengyue}} the 1st month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senshū|qid=Q96759839|1=senshū}}{{efn|ja|先勝|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senshō|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q9418169}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Emperor Sujin|en|Emperor Sujin|qid=Q333530|lt=Emperor Sujin|1=Emperor Sujin}} 1st year（{{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} [[:en:97 BCE|97 BCE]] {{ill|February 17|en|February 17|qid=Q2341|lt=February 17|1=February 17}}） – Legendary enthronement of the 10th Emperor of Japan, {{ill|Emperor Sujin|en|Emperor Sujin|qid=Q333530|lt=Emperor Sujin|1=Emperor Sujin}}. * {{ill|Chōhō (era)|en|Chōhō (era)|qid=Q1324844|lt=Chōhō|1=Chōhō (era)}} 1st year（{{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|999|en|999|qid=Q277307|lt=999|1=999}} {{ill|February 1|en|February 1|qid=Q2312|lt=February 1|1=February 1}}） – Japanese era name changed from {{ill|Chōtoku|en|Chōtoku|qid=Q1327213|lt=Chōtoku|1=Chōtoku}} to Chōhō. * {{ill|Tenshō (Momoyama period)|en|Tenshō (Momoyama period)|qid=Q1145058|lt=Tenshō|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)}} 16th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1588|en|1588|qid=Q6757|lt=1588|1=1588}} {{ill|February 9|en|February 9|qid=Q2324|lt=February 9|1=February 9}}） – Final shōgun of the [[:en:Ashikaga Shogunate|Ashikaga Shogunate]], {{ill|Ashikaga Yoshiaki|en|Ashikaga Yoshiaki|qid=Q434415|lt=Ashikaga Yoshiaki|1=Ashikaga Yoshiaki}}, resigns from his official post and is granted the honorary title {{ill|jun-sangū|ja|准三宮|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/jun-sangū|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 准后|1=Jugō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q10895712}}. The shogunate formally ceases to exist. * {{ill|Jōō (Edo period)|en|Jōō (Edo period)|qid=Q1145081|lt=Jōō|1=Jōō (Edo period)}} 2nd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1653|en|1653|qid=Q6965|lt=1653|1=1653}} {{ill|February 10|en|February 10|qid=Q2325|lt=February 10|1=February 10}}） – The {{ill|Tokugawa shogunate|1=Tokugawa shogunate|2=ja|3=江戸幕府|ja|徳川幕府|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokugawa shogunate|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 江戸幕府}} approves the construction of the {{ill|Tamagawa Aqueduct|en|Tamagawa Aqueduct|qid=Q1014298|lt=Tamagawa Aqueduct|1=Tamagawa Aqueduct}} proposed by a townsman named Seiuemon.
== Births == * {{ill|Tenbun|ja|天文|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenbun|1=Tenmon|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q21096812}} 12th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1543|en|1543|qid=Q6523|lt=1543|1=1543}} {{ill|February 16|en|February 16|qid=Q2342|lt=February 16|1=February 16}}） – [[:en:Kano Eitoku|狩野永徳]], famed painter of the Azuchi–Momoyama period (d. {{ill|1590|en|1590|qid=Q6764|lt=1590|1=1590}}). * {{ill|Bunsei|en|Bunsei|qid=Q1327119|lt=Bunsei|1=Bunsei}} 11th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1828|en|1828|qid=Q7570|lt=1828|1=1828}} {{ill|February 27|en|February 27|qid=Q2361|lt=February 27|1=February 27}}） – [[:en:Kano Hogai|狩野芳崖]], Japanese painter and one of the founders of modern Nihonga (d. {{ill|1888|en|1888|qid=Q7829|lt=1888|1=1888}}).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Kanpyō (era)|en|Kanpyō (era)|qid=Q1346292|lt=Kanpyō|1=Kanpyō (era)}} 3rd year（{{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|891|en|891|qid=Q30580|lt=891|1=891}} {{ill|February 24|en|February 24|qid=Q2355|lt=February 24|1=February 24}}） – {{ill|Fujiwara no Mototsune|en|Fujiwara no Mototsune|qid=Q1397196|lt=藤原基経|1=Fujiwara no Mototsune}}, regent ({{ill|Kanpaku|ja|関白|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanpaku|1=kampaku|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q1199966}}) under Emperor Uda (b. {{ill|836|en|836|qid=Q24957|lt=836|1=836}}). * {{ill|Shōji (era)|en|Shōji (era)|qid=Q1199890|lt=Shōji|1=Shōji (era)}} 1st year（{{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1199|en|1199|qid=Q19752|lt=1199|1=1199}} {{ill|February 9|en|February 9|qid=Q2324|lt=February 9|1=February 9}}） – [[Minamoto no Yoritomo|源頼朝]], founder and first shōgun of the {{ill|Kamakura shogunate|en|Kamakura shogunate|qid=Q736839|lt=Kamakura shogunate|1=Kamakura shogunate}} (b. {{ill|1147|en|1147|qid=Q19629|lt=1147|1=1147}}). * {{ill|Ōei|en|Ōei|qid=Q1193078|lt=Ōei|1=Ōei}} 5th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1398|en|1398|qid=Q6416|lt=1398|1=1398}} {{ill|January 31|en|January 31|qid=Q2289|lt=January 31|1=January 31}}） – {{ill|Emperor Sukō|en|Emperor Sukō|qid=Q471888|lt=崇光天皇|1=Emperor Sukō}}, 3rd emperor of the {{ill|Northern Court|en|Northern Court|qid=Q1201819|lt=Northern Court (Japan)|1=Northern Court}} during the Nanboku-chō period (b. {{ill|1334|en|1334|qid=Q6007|lt=1334|1=1334}}).
== Commemorations == * {{ill|Owari Ōkunitama Shrine|en|Owari Ōkunitama Shrine|qid=Q11465296|lt=Owari Ōkunitama Shrine|1=Owari Ōkunitama Shrine}} hosts the {{ill|Naked Festival (Konomiya Hadaka Matsuri)|ja|国府宮はだか祭|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Naked Festival (Konomiya Hadaka Matsuri)|1=Konomiya Hadaka Matsuri|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q48743940}}, featuring the traditional {{ill|Naoisai|ja|儺追神事|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Naoisai|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} ritual (Aichi Prefecture).
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|1|12|1|14|12|13|2|1|0113|qq=}}
==Notes== <references group="lower-alpha"/> ==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}

[[ko:음력 1월 13일]] [[ja:1月13日 (旧暦)]] [[zh:正月十三]]
[[ar:January 13 (Lunisolar)]] <!--jawiki derived wikidata interwikis--> [[zh-min-nan:1 goe̍h 13 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:正月十三]] <!--zhwiki derived wikidata interwikis--> [[zh-min-nan:1 goe̍h 13 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:正月十三]] {{wikidata link|Q839041}} [[Category:Days 13 of Japanese Lunar months]] [[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]] [[Category:Lunisolar January]] [[Category:Senshō]] [[Category:Wikidata has short description]] [[Category:WikiProject Japanese Calendar]]
